description: ensemble labs inc, dba truefoundry, is a united states technology company specialized in machine learning platform automation and infrastructure as code solutions. the company provides tools and platforms for streamlining machine learning workflows, enabling data scientists and ml engineers to deploy models efficiently. truefoundry's platform automates parts of the ml pipeline, including model training, deployment, monitoring, and sharing, and integrates with ci/cd pipelines and various deployment models such as serverless and cron jobs. the company serves organizations seeking to accelerate and scale their machine learning operations.

lumeros ai is a singaporean company operating in the information technology and services sector, specializing in machine learning testing solutions. the company provides automated and developer-driven testing tools for machine learning products, as well as software development platforms that support ml engineers in managing stakeholders and generating clinical data. lumeros ai serves organizations seeking to deploy machine learning models in new scenarios and requires efficient testing and simulation of model behavior.
core_offerings: Stakeholder Management Services for ML Engineers

description: verute technologies private limited, dba simplismart, is an indian technology company specialized in machine learning model training and deployment solutions. the company provides services for optimizing and deploying machine learning models, including model fine-tuning, deployment, and monitoring, and offers a platform that supports both shared and private infrastructure, integrating with major cloud providers. simplismart serves a range of industries, including financial services, adtech, commerce, data analysis, and healthcare, and is supported by a proprietary inference engine.

zenml gmbh, dba zenml, is a german software company specializing in the development of mlops and llmops platforms. the company provides an open-source, cloud-agnostic framework for machine learning operations, enabling collaboration among data scientists, ml engineers, and mlops developers. zenml supports integration with various machine learning frameworks and cloud providers, and offers both open-source and managed platform options. the company is soc2 and iso certified.

chalk ai, inc, dba chalk, is an american software company specializing in the development and deployment of machine learning platforms. the company provides a data platform for machine learning, offering tools and services for real-time data pipelines, feature engineering, and ml model management. chalk serves industries such as finance, healthcare, and risk management, with a focus on mission-critical applications. its platform is designed to support high-volume workloads and is integrated with major cloud and data tools.

deepmorph is an indian company specialized in end-to-end machine learning (ml) solutions and services, including custom ai/ml solutions, ml pipelines, deployment, mlops, and consulting. the company provides services such as model development, data preprocessing, model training, integration with existing systems, automated data pipelines, feature engineering, model versioning, continuous training, model deployment, monitoring, and scaling. deepmorph serves startups, individuals, and businesses, offering flexible deployment options including cloud infrastructure, multi-cloud support, on-premises deployment, hybrid solutions, and cost optimization.

datatorch is a private company specialized in developing machine learning data tools and platforms for data annotation, project management, and automation. the company provides a modular, customizable platform that supports supervised learning, artificial intelligence, and machine learning workflows, and enables integration with various storage providers. datatorch serves research and development teams, research institutions, and organizations engaged in machine learning production, offering both enterprise and enterprise editions. its platform is designed to support end-to-end machine learning operations, including mlops automation and security compliance through cloud or on-premise hosting.

katana ml is a lithuanian company specialized in open-source machine learning operations (mlops) infrastructure, offering a cloud-based and on-premise platform for machine learning apis and services. the company provides a platform for data processing and prediction service scaling, supporting developers and businesses globally. its platform is built on docker containers and kubernetes.

primary_naics.label: Computing Infrastructure Providers, Data Processing, Web Hosting, and Related Services

description: trainml, llc, dba trainml, is an american limited liability company specialized in providing a serverless gpu-based deep learning infrastructure for machine learning model training and hyperparameter tuning. the company offers a platform that enables users to launch notebooks, run training jobs, and deploy rest api endpoints for inference, supporting a variety of gpu types. trainml serves machine learning developers globally and provides features such as persistent datasets, models, and project management.
core_offerings: Project Management and Access Control Services
industry_name: Computing Infrastructure Providers, Data Processing, Web Hosting, and Related Services

description: hexo ai is a software development company that provides a machine learning development platform for automating the machine learning lifecycle, including data preparation, model deployment, and monitoring. the company offers integration with data infrastructure such as databases, data lakes, warehouses, and streaming sources, and supports deployment in cloud, private cloud, and on-premises environments. hexo ai is soc 2 type ii certified, gdpr compliant, and hipaa compatible, and includes features for model governance, such as documentation, lineage tracking, and bias detection. the platform is designed for organizations of various sizes, including startups and enterprises, and is accessible to users with varying technical backgrounds.

wizard.ai is a united states software company engaged in providing machine learning reliability and governance tools for organizations. the company develops a platform that includes an ml firewall for risk management in development and production environments, as well as a testing toolkit for the rapid development of fair, auditable, transparent, and explainable models. wizard.ai serves data teams, including data scientists and ml engineers, and offers an api for model development and risk mitigation.

aquarium is a united states software company specializing in machine learning data operations and management. the company provides a saas platform for data quality analysis, model evaluation, data collection, and sampling, supporting businesses in managing complex datasets. aquarium serves clients in sectors such as healthcare, insurance, agriculture, and self-driving cars, and is soc2 type 2 certified for data security.

armai is a german company engaged in machine learning (ml) systems design and architecture, with a focus on delivering end-to-end ml projects. the company provides services such as defining business requirements, data preparation, running experiments, validating solutions, deploying solutions, monitoring solutions, retraining models, and ml support, supported by governance guidelines, team collaboration, and robust ml workflows. armai serves industries requiring advanced ml solutions.
core_offerings: Machine Learning Systems Design and Architecture

description: deepstributed ltd. is a swiss company engaged in providing machine learning experimentation platforms. the company offers a platform that enables users to run machine learning experiments without configuration, utilizing private, community, or cloud gpu resources. deepstributed serves machine learning engineers, startups, and businesses seeking to enhance their machine learning capabilities, with a focus on distributed computing and gpu resource management.
core_offerings: ML Experiment Management and Tracking Services

description: zokorp is a united states company specialized in ai/ml and data analytics, with a focus on consulting and integration services for businesses and individuals. the company provides aws consultation, apn consultation, and offers aws ml products, including containerized etl solutions and data analytics workflow tools. zokorp also operates as a provider of cloud computing and machine learning solutions, supporting businesses in designing, deploying, and optimizing ai/ml and data analytics initiatives.

ripley decision advantage is a consulting firm engaged in ai/ml tools and workflow optimization for businesses and public sector organizations. the company provides services such as bespoke ai/ml model development, model explainability, performance, scalability, model development and training, and ml ops. ripley decision advantage also offers assessments of existing vendors and is involved in the development of pre-sales for ai and ml tools, data products, voice-enabled agentic ai, and digital twin solutions. the firm serves clients globally and is headquartered in silicon valley, california.

description: aiadvantage is an australian company specialized in artificial intelligence (ai) and machine learning (ml) solutions. the company provides customized ai and ml services and operates an online platform designed to facilitate the application of ai and ml technologies for businesses and organizations.
core_offerings: AI and Machine Learning Solutions Development

description: tensorflow jvm special interest group is a computer software entity operating within the information technology and services sector, focused on enabling machine learning capabilities by supporting tensorflow on any java virtual machine (jvm) for building, training, and running models. the group provides utilities and frameworks to assist data scientists and developers in common machine learning tasks, supporting compatibility with java and other jvm languages such as scala and kotlin for use in enterprises worldwide.

description: fraunhofer gesellschaft zur förderung der angewandten forschung e.v., dba iml4e, is a german research and development organization specialized in the development, operation, and maintenance of ai-based software, with a focus on the european software industry. the organization develops a european framework for ai-based software development, including a continuous auditing based certification (cabc) for mlops and a mlops framework that integrates technology, methodology, and platform layers. iml4e also provides teaching materials and playbooks to support the adoption of mlops in enterprises, and its work is relevant to european and international standardization bodies. the organization is supported by a network of partners and collaborators and is involved in research and development activities related to data protection and privacy.

description: stanford dawn is a research project focused on democratizing machine learning by developing tools and technologies that enable non-expert users to build production-quality data products. the project addresses challenges in data management, feature selection, model training, productionization, and monitoring in the ml production pipeline, and collaborates with faculty, students, and industry partners to advance ml solutions. it operates globally, with a primary focus on making ml accessible to a broader audience.
industry_name: Research and Development in the Physical, Engineering, and Life Sciences (except Nanotechnology and Biotechnology)

description: collective knowledge is a french company operating in the information technology and services sector, with a focus on artificial intelligence, machine learning, and automation. the company develops open-source platforms and workflow automation frameworks for co-designing software and hardware to support ai and ml workloads, and provides it services and consulting related to these domains. collective knowledge also organizes public hackathons and collaborates with industry partners to advance research and development in ai and ml.

pycaret is a canadian open-source software library that provides a low-code, modular framework for machine learning workflows. the library automates data preprocessing, model training, and model explainability, and supports the deployment of machine learning models as rest apis or front-end applications. pycaret serves as a python wrapper for various machine learning libraries and frameworks, enabling data scientists and citizen data scientists to perform end-to-end machine learning experiments with minimal code. the library is designed to be scalable, fast, and explainable, and is supported by a community of users and developers.

prateek dubey is a singaporean data professional specializing in data engineering, cloud computing, and machine learning. he serves as the head of data engineering at chubb life, singapore, overseeing teams that develop ai and data products for clients. his work includes architecting, developing, and supporting data, ai, and ml platforms, as well as data engineering pipelines, feature engineering, model serving, and data architecture solutions. prateek dubey also operates as a blogger and video creator, providing insights on big data, cloud computing, devops, ci/cd, ml platforms, ml engineering, data governance, and data engineering.

vectice, inc. is an american private company that develops a data science documentation platform for artificial intelligence and machine learning. the company provides a platform for continuous documentation, model dependency mapping, and project governance, supporting data science, modeling and marketing research, it, and security teams. vectice integrates with various ai and ml tools and offers features such as automated lineage tracking, integration of validation libraries, and customizable workflows. the platform is designed to facilitate regulatory mlops and compliance for organizations in the ai and machine learning sectors.

description: the entity associated with the domain icontributetoml.herokuapp.com is a canadian research and development organization engaged in the development and dissemination of machine learning algorithms and their properties. the organization operates as a service provider in the technology industry, focusing on machine learning solutions and algorithmic properties, and provides a platform for capturing and synthesizing the properties of ml algorithms. its target markets include domains such as biology, cybersecurity, intelligence, marketing, and medical diagnosis, with a focus on domain specialists who are not ml experts. the organization also offers resources for data pre-processing pipelines and facilitates the proposal and refinement of ml algorithms.

description: clozon technologies private limited, dba clozon, is an indian private company that provides artificial intelligence and machine learning consulting, devops services, and cloud computing solutions. the company offers services such as ai/ml strategy consulting, model training and deployment, monitoring and management, and implementation of ai/ml solutions. it also delivers managed cloud services, including cloud hosting, application migration, and managed support for cloud environments, supporting clients with cloud consulting, setup, and migration across aws, azure, and google cloud platforms.

nimblebox, inc., dba nimblebox, is an american technology company specialized in providing a platform for machine learning model development and deployment. the company operates as a software-as-a-service provider, offering a plug-and-play mlops platform that supports open-source large language models and enables the creation of generative ai applications. nimblebox serves data scientists, ml engineers, and organizations in the technology and artificial intelligence sectors, with operations based in san francisco, california, and an additional office in chennai, india.

chen qian is a machine learning engineer and computer scientist specializing in deep learning, large language models, and machine learning operations. he is a co-founder of kerasnlp, a natural language processing library, and is involved in the development of mlflow and dspy, contributing to open-source machine learning platforms and frameworks. chen qian is also active in the areas of ml data processing, model authoring, training, optimization, and deployment, and is involved in backend and infrastructure engineering, building scalable web services. he is available to give tech talks and workshops on deep learning, focusing on training, finetuning, and mlops with mlflow.

datavisum is a brazilian company specialized in providing artificial intelligence (ai) and machine learning (ml) solutions for small and medium-sized enterprises (smes) in brazil. the company offers consulting, training, and a cloud-based platform that supports real-time predictions and data extraction, enabling businesses to adopt ai and ml tools securely and efficiently. datavisum serves clients across various industries in brazil.

description: etiq ai limited, dba etiq ai, is a british company specialized in providing data science and ai platform solutions, including a data science copilot platform that supports ai and machine learning pipeline development, testing, and debugging. the company offers tools for lineage analysis, testing recommendations, and root cause analysis, as well as real-time testing capabilities and spark integration for ai and ml model development. etiq ai serves data scientists, ai model developers, and organizations seeking to improve their ai and ml pipeline development processes, with support available in multiple languages.

description: nicolas stellwag, dba deepspect, is a german company specialized in developing software platforms that bridge the gap between computed tomography (ct) and machine learning (ml) technologies. the company focuses on providing a self-hostable platform for managing ct data for ml applications, including data normalization, annotation, augmentation, and integration with ml tools. deepspect serves clients in the medical imaging and machine learning sectors, offering both cloud-based and self-hosted solutions, and emphasizes data security for non-destructive testing (ndt) data.

efemarai continuum is a united states company specialized in artificial intelligence and machine learning, with a focus on quality assurance, software development, and model visualization. the company provides a platform for testing and improving machine learning models, supporting a range of tasks including object detection, classification, segmentation, pose estimation, and regression, and is compatible with multiple model frameworks. efemarai continuum serves industries such as agriculture, healthcare, and retail, and is supported by a community of developers and users.

knowledgator is a british company specialized in artificial intelligence and machine learning, with a focus on fundamental encoder-only models for information extraction. the company operates as a provider of open-source machine learning models and services, offering solutions for developers, researchers, and organizations seeking ai-driven information extraction and data processing. its activities include the development and distribution of machine learning models, provision of fine-tuning and deployment services, and support for data annotation and model training. knowledgator also offers resources such as documentation, tutorials, and a developer forum to facilitate model usage and integration. the company serves enterprises and organizations in the ai and data analytics sectors, supporting software development, big data, and enterprise software needs.

pmc optimized ltd, dba pmc optimized, is a british information technology and services company specialized in it consulting, machine learning consultancy, data science, and cloud services. the company focuses on machine learning model development, data analysis, insight generation, and model deployment to cloud services, and integrates technologies such as artificial intelligence, deep learning, computer vision, and python programming. pmc optimized also supports cloud-based machine learning operations.

rebataur pvt. ltd., dba rebataur, is an indian data science company specialized in providing ai/ml tools and services, as well as it consulting and support. the company develops and offers a self-hosted platform for developers to experiment with data and generate ai/ml rest apis, and also provides consulting and support services to enhance the functionality and scalability of its platform. rebataur serves developers and data scientists, primarily targeting business clients, and integrates open-source technologies and cloud integration into its offerings.

description: comet ml, inc., dba comet, is a united states company specialized in providing an end-to-end model evaluation platform for artificial intelligence development and deployment. the company offers tools for evaluating the output of large language model-powered applications, experiment management, model registry, and model production monitoring, supporting a broad range of machine learning frameworks and platforms. comet serves data scientists, ml practitioners, and engineers in enterprise environments, with a global presence.
core_offerings: Machine Learning Research and Development Services

description: infer systems limited, dba infer systems, is a uk private company specialized in data engineering, applied artificial intelligence, and machine learning operations. the company provides solutions for creating production data engineering and inference operational environments, as well as data analysis services to support business outcomes. infer systems also offers software development and training services, and collaborates with partners to deliver tailored solutions.

description: highsideai is a united states company engaged in providing ai and machine learning services for the us government and department of defense. the company offers privately hosted ai applications, secure large language model inferencing, and ai/ml training environments, as well as integration with existing tools such as sharepoint, confluence, and mattermost. highsideai also provides training programs for administrators and end users, enabling organizations to deploy secure ai solutions in classified environments and field operations.

proximascale is a ukrainian company engaged in ai development and generative ai consulting services. the company provides subscription-based ai agent development, including customized solutions for organizations, and offers services such as bug fixes, api integrations, aws setup, and ongoing support. proximascale serves clients in the technology sector and utilizes python for app and model development across multiple platforms.

ai2device is a polish company specialized in the design and development of ai-powered smart devices, with a focus on integrating machine learning and blockchain technology into it solutions. the company also provides services in writing and testing ml algorithms, creating data sets for neural networks, and developing applications for multiple platforms. its target markets include academic institutions, high-tech corporations, and the military sector.

kortical limited, dba kortical, is a british technology company specialized in artificial intelligence and machine learning solutions, including automl, ml ops, and ai as a service. the company provides a platform for data scientists and coders to build, deploy, and maintain machine learning models, supporting a range of use cases such as supply chain optimization, predictive maintenance, tax automation, and customer churn prediction. kortical also offers ai consulting, data science training, and support services. the company is carbon neutral and emphasizes ethical practices, including data security and privacy.
